name: Crispy Honey Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the honey, Worcestershire sauce, and ground ginger.
2. Grill the chicken wings 4-6 inches from medium coals for 20-25 minutes.
3. Brush the wings frequently with the honey mixture during cooking.
4. Turn the wings after 10 minutes of grilling.
5. Continue grilling until the chicken is thoroughly cooked.
NOTE: If white Worcestershire sauce is unavailable, use the dark variety instead.
